steps.arguments:
{"inp":{"code":"# Compute financial indicators for Auren Energia as of 2024-03-31
from decimal import Decimal
# Given values from input (using floats)
price = 11.4
shares = 1_000_000_000
# Balances (Último 2024-03-31)
ativo = 27694357000.0
ativo_circ = 5347929000.0
caixa = 3094615000.0
aplic_fin = 0.0
disponibilidades = caixa + aplic_fin
contas_receber = 569252000.0
outros_ac_circ = 1521179000.0
ativo_nao_circ = 22346428000.0
# Passivo
passivo_circ = 3183325000.0
fornecedores = 410719000.0
emprestimos_cur = 865022000.0
outros_obrig_circ = 1752321000.0
passivo_nao_circ = 12287567000.0
emprestimos_long = 5673472000.0
# Patrimonio liquido
patrimonio = 12223465000.0
# Income statement (quarter and annual base for TTM calc)
# Q1 2024 (ÚLTIMO quarter)
rev_q1_2024 = 1397531000.0
cogs_q1_2024 = -1106505000.0
gross_q1_2024 = 291026000.0
ebit_q1_2024 = 499841000.0
net_q1_2024 = 253618000.0
dep_q1_2024 = -158248000.0
# Q1 2023 (PENÚLTIMO quarter)
rev_q1_2023 = 1414510000.0
cogs_q1_2023 = -1082666000.0
gross_q1_2023 = 331844000.0
ebit_q1_2023 = 313784000.0
net_q1_2023 = 229952000.0
dep_q1_2023 = -159460000.0
# Annual 2023 (ÚLTIMO annual)
rev_2023 = 6181890000.0
gross_2023 = 1332944000.0
ebit_2023 = 1073914000.0
net_2023 = -317689000.0
dep_2023 = -641809000.0
# Compute TTM = annual + current quarter - same quarter last year
rev_ttm = rev_2023 + rev_q1_2024 - rev_q1_2023
ebit_ttm = ebit_2023 + ebit_q1_2024 - ebit_q1_2023
net_ttm = net_2023 + net_q1_2024 - net_q1_2023
gross_ttm = gross_2023 + gross_q1_2024 - gross_q1_2023
# Depreciation TTM
dep_ttm = dep_2023 + dep_q1_2024 - dep_q1_2023
# Debt
div_bruta = emprestimos_cur + emprestimos_long
div_liquida = div_bruta - disponibilidades
# Market cap and EV
market_cap = price * shares
ev = market_cap + div_bruta - disponibilidades
# EBITDA TTM = EBIT TTM + abs(dep_ttm)
ebitda_ttm = ebit_ttm - dep_ttm  # since dep_ttm is negative in data

# Other ratios
vpa = patrimonio / shares
lpa = net_ttm / shares

p_vp = price / vpa if vpa!=0 else None
p_l = price / lpa if lpa!=0 else None
p_ebit = market_cap / ebit_ttm if ebit_ttm!=0 else None
psr = market_cap / rev_ttm if rev_ttm!=0 else None
p_ativos = market_cap / ativo if ativo!=0 else None
capital_giro = ativo_circ - passivo_circ
p_cap_giro = market_cap / capital_giro if capital_giro!=0 else None
p_ativ_circ_liq = market_cap / capital_giro if capital_giro!=0 else None

ev_ebitda = ev / ebitda_ttm if ebitda_ttm!=0 else None
ev_ebit = ev / ebit_ttm if ebit_ttm!=0 else None

# Margins (in percent)
marg_bruta = (gross_ttm / rev_ttm)*100 if rev_ttm!=0 else None
marg_ebit = (ebit_ttm / rev_ttm)*100 if rev_ttm!=0 else None
marg_liq = (net_ttm / rev_ttm)*100 if rev_ttm!=0 else None

# EBIT / Ativo
ebit_ativo = (ebit_ttm / ativo)*100 if ativo!=0 else None
# ROIC = EBIT / (Ativo - Fornecedores - Caixa)
roic_denom = ativo - fornecedores - caixa
roic = (ebit_ttm / roic_denom)*100 if roic_denom!=0 else None
# ROE = Net / Patrimonio
roe = (net_ttm / patrimonio)*100 if patrimonio!=0 else None
# Liquidez Corr
liquidez_corr = ativo_circ / passivo_circ if passivo_circ!=0 else None
# Div Br/ Patrim
divbr_patrim = div_bruta / patrimonio if patrimonio!=0 else None
# Giro Ativos
giro_ativos = rev_ttm / ativo if ativo!=0 else None

# Prepare results
results = {
    'Ativo': ativo,
    'Disponibilidades': disponibilidades,
    'Ativo Circulante': ativo_circ,
    'Dív. Bruta': div_bruta,
    'Dív. Líquida': div_liquida,
    'Patrim. Líq': patrimonio,
    'Receita Líquida (12 meses)': rev_ttm,
    'EBIT (12 meses)': ebit_ttm,
    'Lucro L�edquido (12 meses)': net_ttm,
    'Receita L�edquida (3 meses)': rev_q1_2024,
    'EBIT (3 meses)': ebit_q1_2024,
    'Lucro L�edquido (3 meses)': net_q1_2024,
    'P/L': p_l,
    'P/VP': p_vp,
    'P/EBIT': p_ebit,
    'PSR': psr,
    'P/Ativos': p_ativos,
    'P/Cap. Giro': p_cap_giro,
    'P/Ativ Circ Liq': p_ativ_circ_liq,
    'EV / EBITDA': ev_ebitda,
    'EV / EBIT': ev_ebit,
    'LPA': lpa,
    'VPA': vpa,
    'Marg. Bruta': marg_bruta,
    'Marg. EBIT': marg_ebit,
    'Marg. L�edquida': marg_liq,
    'EBIT / Ativo': ebit_ativo,
    'ROIC': roic,
    'ROE': roe,
    'Liquidez Corr': liquidez_corr,
    'Div Br/ Patrim': divbr_patrim,
    'Giro Ativos': giro_ativos
}

# Print results rounded appropriately
import json
# Round numbers
def r(x,dec=2):
    if x is None:
        return None
    return float(round(x,dec))

out = {k: r(v,4) if k in ['Ativo','Disponibilidades','Ativo Circulante','D\u00edv. Bruta','D\u00edv. L\u00edquida','Patrim. L\u00adq','Receita L\u00adquida (12 meses)','EBIT (12 meses)'] else r(v,4) for k,v in results.items()}
# But adjust per-indicator rounding: monetary large ints no need but will keep
# Print dictionary
print(json.dumps(results,indent=2))

# Also print market cap and EV and EBITDA for visibility
print('\nComputed extra:')
print('market_cap =',market_cap)
print('EV =',ev)
print('EBITDA TTM =',ebitda_ttm)

"} }
steps.name: code_interpreter

steps.output: {'status': 'error', 'report': 'Failed to run code: embedded null byte'}

{"inp":{"code":"# Recompute without problematic characters
price = 11.4
shares = 1_000_000_000
# Balances
ativo = 27694357000.0
ativo_circ = 5347929000.0
caixa = 3094615000.0
aplic_fin = 0.0
disponibilidades = caixa + aplic_fin
# Passivo
passivo_circ = 3183325000.0
fornecedores = 410719000.0
emprestimos_cur = 865022000.0
emprestimos_long = 5673472000.0
# Patrimonio
patrimonio = 12223465000.0
# Income statement
rev_q1_2024 = 1397531000.0
gross_q1_2024 = 291026000.0
ebit_q1_2024 = 499841000.0
net_q1_2024 = 253618000.0
dep_q1_2024 = -158248000.0
rev_q1_2023 = 1414510000.0
gross_q1_2023 = 331844000.0
ebit_q1_2023 = 313784000.0
net_q1_2023 = 229952000.0
dep_q1_2023 = -159460000.0
rev_2023 = 6181890000.0
gross_2023 = 1332944000.0
ebit_2023 = 1073914000.0
net_2023 = -317689000.0
dep_2023 = -641809000.0
# TTM
rev_ttm = rev_2023 + rev_q1_2024 - rev_q1_2023
ebit_ttm = ebit_2023 + ebit_q1_2024 - ebit_q1_2023
net_ttm = net_2023 + net_q1_2024 - net_q1_2023
gross_ttm = gross_2023 + gross_q1_2024 - gross_q1_2023
dep_ttm = dep_2023 + dep_q1_2024 - dep_q1_2023
# Debt
div_bruta = emprestimos_cur + emprestimos_long
div_liquida = div_bruta - disponibilidades
# Market cap and EV
market_cap = price * shares
ev = market_cap + div_bruta - disponibilidades
# EBITDA
ebitda_ttm = ebit_ttm - dep_ttm
# Per-share
vpa = patrimonio / shares
lpa = net_ttm / shares
# Ratios
p_vp = price / vpa if vpa!=0 else None
p_l = price / lpa if lpa!=0 else None
p_ebit = market_cap / ebit_ttm if ebit_ttm!=0 else None
psr = market_cap / rev_ttm if rev_ttm!=0 else None
p_ativos = market_cap / ativo if ativo!=0 else None
capital_giro = ativo_circ - passivo_circ
p_cap_giro = market_cap / capital_giro if capital_giro!=0 else None
p_ativ_circ_liq = market_cap / capital_giro if capital_giro!=0 else None
ev_ebitda = ev / ebitda_ttm if ebitda_ttm!=0 else None
ev_ebit = ev / ebit_ttm if ebit_ttm!=0 else None
marg_bruta = (gross_ttm / rev_ttm)*100 if rev_ttm!=0 else None
marg_ebit = (ebit_ttm / rev_ttm)*100 if rev_ttm!=0 else None
marg_liq = (net_ttm / rev_ttm)*100 if rev_ttm!=0 else None
ebit_ativo = (ebit_ttm / ativo)*100 if ativo!=0 else None
roic_denom = ativo - fornecedores - caixa
roic = (ebit_ttm / roic_denom)*100 if roic_denom!=0 else None
roe = (net_ttm / patrimonio)*100 if patrimonio!=0 else None
liquidez_corr = ativo_circ / passivo_circ if passivo_circ!=0 else None
divbr_patrim = div_bruta / patrimonio if patrimonio!=0 else None
giro_ativos = rev_ttm / ativo if ativo!=0 else None

# Print results
from pprint import pprint
pprint({
'Ativo': ativo,
'Disponibilidades': disponibilidades,
'Ativo Circulante': ativo_circ,
'Dív. Bruta': div_bruta,
'Dív. Líquida': div_liquida,
'Patrim. Líq': patrimonio,
'Receita Líquida (12 meses)': rev_ttm,
'EBIT (12 meses)': ebit_ttm,
'Lucro Líquido (12 meses)': net_ttm,
'Receita Líquida (3 meses)': rev_q1_2024,
'EBIT (3 meses)': ebit_q1_2024,
'Lucro Líquido (3 meses)': net_q1_2024,
'P/L': p_l,
'P/VP': p_vp,
'P/EBIT': p_ebit,
'PSR': psr,
'P/Ativos': p_ativos,
'P/Cap. Giro': p_cap_giro,
'P/Ativ Circ Liq': p_ativ_circ_liq,
'EV / EBITDA': ev_ebitda,
'EV / EBIT': ev_ebit,
'LPA': lpa,
'VPA': vpa,
'Marg. Bruta (%)': marg_bruta,
'Marg. EBIT (%)': marg_ebit,
'Marg. Líquida (%)': marg_liq,
'EBIT / Ativo (%)': ebit_ativo,
'ROIC (%)': roic,
'ROE (%)': roe,
'Liquidez Corr': liquidez_corr,
'Div Br/ Patrim': divbr_patrim,
'Giro Ativos': giro_ativos,
'market_cap': market_cap,
'EV': ev,
'EBITDA TTM': ebitda_ttm
})

# Print rounded friendly
print('\nRounded values:')
for k,v in [('Ativo',ativo),('Disponibilidades',disponibilidades),('Patrim. Líq',patrimonio),('Receita TTM',rev_ttm),('EBIT TTM',ebit_ttm),('Net TTM',net_ttm),('LPA',lpa),('VPA',vpa),('P/VP',p_vp),('P/L',p_l),('P/EBIT',p_ebit),('PSR',psr),('EV/EBITDA',ev_ebitda),('EV/EBIT',ev_ebit)]:
    print(f"{k}: {round(v,4) if v is not None else None}")

"} }
